title: Hiring Software Engineer at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Software Engineer in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd!
